case_title: HUI CONG YU VS. DONGWEI XUE ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, HUI CONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT XUE, DONGWEI HONG, SHAN DEFENDANT OWNER NOT PRESENT OR DRIVING THE CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,736.00 FILED BY YU, HUI CONG AS TO DEFENDANT XUE, DONGWEI HONG, SHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HUI CONG YU. DEFENDANT SHANG HONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DONGWEI XUE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $102.00 SERVED DEC-12-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT XUE, DONGWEI
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY YU, HUI CONG HONG, SHAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $102.00 SERVED DEC-13-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT XUE, DONGWEI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $102.00 SERVED DEC-12-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HONG, SHAN
